item.title: [Segurança] Adobe Patches Actively Exploited Acrobat Reader Flaw CVE-2026-34621
item.description:
🚨 Adobe Patches Actively Exploited Acrobat Reader Flaw CVE-2026-34621
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.6
Resumo:
Adobe has released emergency updates to fix a critical security flaw in Acrobat Reader that has come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability, assigned the CVE identifier CVE-2026-34621, carries a CVSS score of 8.6 out of 10.0. Successful exploitation of the flaw could allow an attacker to run malicious code on affected installations.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/adobe-patches-actively-exploited.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-40242 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-40242 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.2
Resumo:
Arcane is an interface for managing Docker containers, images, networks, and volumes. Prior to 1.17.3, the /api/templates/fetch endpoint accepts a caller-supplied url parameter and performs a server-side HTTP GET request to that URL without authentication and without URL scheme or host validation. The server's response is returned directly to the caller. This constitutes an unauthenticated SSRF vulnerability affectin...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40242

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-3358 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-3358 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.4
Resumo:
The Tutor LMS – eLearning and online course solution plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized private course enrollment in all versions up to, and including, 3.9.7. This is due to missing post_status validation in the `enroll_now()` and `course_enrollment()` functions. Both enrollment endpoints verify the nonce, user authentication, and whether the course is purchasable, but fail to check if the course has...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3358

item.title: [Segurança] Critical Marimo pre-auth RCE flaw now under active exploitation
item.description:
💣 Critical Marimo pre-auth RCE flaw now under active exploitation
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A critical pre-authentication remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability in Marimo is now under active exploitation, leveraged for credential theft.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/critical-marimo-pre-auth-rce-flaw-now-under-active-exploitation/

item.title: [Segurança] CPUID Breach Distributes STX RAT via Trojanized CPU-Z and HWMonitor Downloads
item.description:
📰 CPUID Breach Distributes STX RAT via Trojanized CPU-Z and HWMonitor Downloads
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Unknown threat actors compromised CPUID ("cpuid[.]com"), a website that hosts popular hardware monitoring tools like CPU-Z, HWMonitor, HWMonitor Pro, and PerfMonitor, for less than 24 hours to serve malicious executables for the software and deploy a remote access trojan called STX RAT. The incident lasted from approximately April 9, 15:00 UTC, to about April 10, 10:00 UTC, with
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/cpuid-breach-distributes-stx-rat-via.html

item.title: [Segurança] Over 20,000 crypto fraud victims identified in international crackdown
item.description:
📰 Over 20,000 crypto fraud victims identified in international crackdown
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
An international law enforcement action led by the U.K.'s National Crime Agency (NCA) has identified over 20,000 victims of cryptocurrency fraud across Canada, the United Kingdom, and the United States.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/police-identifies-20-000-victims-in-international-crypto-fraud-crackdown/

item.title: [Segurança] Citizen Lab: Law Enforcement Used Webloc to Track 500 Million Devices via Ad Data
item.description:
📰 Citizen Lab: Law Enforcement Used Webloc to Track 500 Million Devices via Ad Data
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Hungarian domestic intelligence, the national police in El Salvador, and several U.S. law enforcement and police departments have been attributed to the use of an advertising-based global geolocation surveillance system called Webloc. The tool was developed by Israeli company Cobwebs Technologies and is now sold by its successor Penlink after the two firms merged in July 2023
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/citizen-lab-law-enforcement-used-webloc.html
